title: Chev Walker
description: Former GB & England international rugby league & union footballer
extract: Chev Walker (born 9 October 1982) is an English professional rugby league coach who is an assistant coach at the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League and a former professional rugby league footballer who last played for the Bradford Bulls in the Championship. He played both rugby league and rugby union as a professional. A Great Britain and England international representative centre, Walker played in the Super League for the Leeds Rhinos, Hull Kingston Rovers and the Bradford Bulls.
